Name: ADebugCameraController
Description:
Camera controller that allows you to fly around a level mostly unrestricted by normal movement rules.

 To turn it on, please press Alt+C or both (left and right) analogs on XBox pad,
 or use the "ToggleDebugCamera" console command. Check the debug camera bindings
 in DefaultPawn.cpp for the camera controls.

Variables.Name: bShowSelectedInfo
Variables.Description: Whether to show information about the selected actor on the debug camera HUD.

Variables.Name: SpeedScale
Variables.Description: Allows control over the speed of the spectator pawn. This scales the speed based on the InitialMaxSpeed. Use Set Pawn Movement Speed Scale during runtime

Variables.Name: InitialMaxSpeed
Variables.Description: Initial max speed of the spectator pawn when we start possession.

Variables.Name: InitialAccel
Variables.Description: Initial acceleration of the spectator pawn when we start possession.

Variables.Name: InitialDecel
Variables.Description: Initial deceleration of the spectator pawn when we start possession.

Functions.Name: ToggleDisplay
Functions.Description: Toggles the display of debug info and input commands for the Debug Camera.

Functions.Name: SetPawnMovementSpeedScale
Functions.Description: Sets the pawn movement speed scale.

Functions.Name: ReceiveOnActivate
Functions.Description: Function called on activation of debug camera controller.

Params.Name: OriginalPC
Params.Description: The active player controller before this debug camera controller was possessed by the player.

Functions.Name: ReceiveOnDeactivate
Functions.Description: Function called on deactivation of debug camera controller.

Params.Name: RestoredPC
Params.Description: The Player Controller that the player input is being returned to.

Functions.Name: ReceiveOnActorSelected
Functions.Description:
Called when an actor has been selected with the primary key (e.g. left mouse button).
	 
	  The selection trace starts from the center of the debug camera's view.

Params.Name: SelectHitLocation
Params.Description: The exact world-space location where the selection trace hit the New Selected Actor.

Params.Name: SelectHitNormal
Params.Description: The world-space surface normal of the New Selected Actor at the hit location.
